entries.name: detect-fixture
entries.description: Locate a named kitchen fixture (door, drawer, knob, handle, button, spout) from camera using YOLO + depth, return its 3D pose. Shared utility used by every fixture-manipulation task.

entries.name: detect-object
entries.description: Locate a named object on a surface from camera using YOLO + depth, return its 3D pose. Shared utility for pick-and-place tasks.

entries.name: navigate-to-fixture
entries.description: Move the mobile base into manipulation range of a given fixture pose. Shared utility for every fixture task.

entries.name: grasp-handle
entries.description: Cartesian grasp of a bar/cylinder handle (door or drawer) at a given pose. Approach along fixture normal, close gripper.

entries.name: navigate-kitchen
entries.description: Navigate the mobile base to a target location in the kitchen. Env: RoboCasa-Navigate-Kitchen-v0. Pure base motion, no manipulation.

entries.name: open-single-door
entries.description: Open a single kitchen cabinet/fridge door. Env: RoboCasa-Open-Single-Door-v0. Detect handle, navigate, grasp handle, pull along hinge arc.

entries.name: close-single-door
entries.description: Close a single kitchen cabinet/fridge door. Env: RoboCasa-Close-Single-Door-v0.

entries.name: open-double-door
entries.description: Open both leaves of a double door. Env: RoboCasa-Open-Double-Door-v0. Composes open-single-door twice.

entries.name: close-double-door
entries.description: Close both leaves of a double door. Env: RoboCasa-Close-Double-Door-v0.

entries.name: open-drawer
entries.description: Open a kitchen drawer by grasping the handle and pulling linearly. Env: RoboCasa-Open-Drawer-v0.

entries.name: close-drawer
entries.description: Close a kitchen drawer with a linear push. Env: RoboCasa-Close-Drawer-v0.

entries.name: turn-on-microwave
entries.description: Press the start button on the microwave. Env: RoboCasa-Turn-On-Microwave-v0.

entries.name: turn-off-microwave
entries.description: Press the stop button on a running microwave. Env: RoboCasa-Turn-Off-Microwave-v0. Reuses the validated button-press code from turn-on-microwave.

entries.name: turn-on-stove
entries.description: Rotate a stove knob to turn a burner on. Env: RoboCasa-Turn-On-Stove-v0.

entries.name: turn-off-stove
entries.description: Rotate a stove knob to turn a burner off. Env: RoboCasa-Turn-Off-Stove-v0. Reuses knob-grasp code from turn-on-stove.

entries.name: turn-on-faucet
entries.description: Turn on the sink faucet by rotating the handle. Env: RoboCasa-Turn-On-Sink-Faucet-v0.

entries.name: turn-off-faucet
entries.description: Turn off the sink faucet. Env: RoboCasa-Turn-Off-Sink-Faucet-v0. Reuses handle-grasp from turn-on-faucet.

entries.name: turn-sink-spout
entries.description: Rotate the sink spout sideways to a target angle. Env: RoboCasa-Turn-Sink-Spout-v0. Different motion from faucet handle; separate pipeline.

entries.name: coffee-press-button
entries.description: Press the brew button on the coffee machine. Env: RoboCasa-Coffee-Press-Button-v0.

entries.name: pnp-coffee
entries.description: Canonical coffee pick-and-place: pick a mug and place it at the coffee-machine area. Env: RoboCasa-Pn-P-Coffee-v0. Establishes the mug-handling pipeline reused by setup-mug and serve-mug.

entries.name: coffee-setup-mug
entries.description: Place an empty mug under the coffee-machine spout. Env: RoboCasa-Coffee-Setup-Mug-v0. Specializes pnp-coffee with a precise place point.

entries.name: coffee-serve-mug
entries.description: Pick a filled mug from the coffee machine and place it on the counter. Env: RoboCasa-Coffee-Serve-Mug-v0. Inverse direction of pnp-coffee.

entries.name: pnp-counter-to-cab
entries.description: Canonical PnP: pick an object from the counter and place it inside a cabinet. Env: RoboCasa-Pn-P-Counter-To-Cab-v0. Hub skill that establishes the full pick+place pipeline reused by all sibling PnP tasks.

entries.name: pnp-cab-to-counter
entries.description: Pick an object from a cabinet and place it on the counter. Env: RoboCasa-Pn-P-Cab-To-Counter-v0. Inverse of counter-to-cab, swaps pick/place poses.

entries.name: pnp-counter-to-sink
entries.description: Pick from counter, place in sink. Env: RoboCasa-Pn-P-Counter-To-Sink-v0. Swaps destination fixture from counter-to-cab.

entries.name: pnp-sink-to-counter
entries.description: Pick from sink, place on counter. Env: RoboCasa-Pn-P-Sink-To-Counter-v0. Inverse of counter-to-sink.

entries.name: pnp-counter-to-stove
entries.description: Pick from counter, place on stove. Env: RoboCasa-Pn-P-Counter-To-Stove-v0.

entries.name: pnp-stove-to-counter
entries.description: Pick from stove, place on counter. Env: RoboCasa-Pn-P-Stove-To-Counter-v0.

entries.name: pnp-counter-to-microwave
entries.description: Pick from counter, place inside microwave. Env: RoboCasa-Pn-P-Counter-To-Microwave-v0.

entries.name: pnp-microwave-to-counter
entries.description: Pick from microwave, place on counter. Env: RoboCasa-Pn-P-Microwave-To-Counter-v0.
